parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'MiniMax-M2.7', temperature: 0, max_tokens: 2000, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a commit triage assistant for a private fork of the mem0 repository. Your job is to review cherry-pick candidates and confirm which ones should be applied.

The fork uses these components:
- mem0/ (core Python SDK) - ALWAYS relevant
- openmemory/ (self-hosted MCP server) - ALWAYS relevant
- server/ (REST API server) - relevant
- synaptic_memory/ (custom addition) - our code, upstream won't have this

For each candidate, respond with APPROVE or SKIP and a brief reason.

Prioritize:
- Bug fixes (especially in LLM connectors, vector stores, memory operations)
- Security fixes
- Feature additions to core SDK or openmemory

Skip:
- Version bumps with no code changes
- Documentation-only changes
- CI/CD workflow changes
- Changes only to embedchain/ or openclaw/
- TypeScript SDK changes (unless they fix shared logic)' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Review these upstream commits for cherry-picking into our private fork:

Pre-approved by heuristics (' + $json.approved_count + '):
' + JSON.stringify($json.candidates, null, 2) + '

Borderline - need your judgement (' + $json.borderline_count + '):
' + JSON.stringify($json.borderline, null, 2) + '

Respond with a JSON array of {sha, verdict: "approve"|"skip", reason} for ALL commits listed above.' } ] }) }}
